ORDER ADVANCING HEARING ON PETITION TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM MECHANIC'S LIEN

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER 973 MARKET ASSOCIATES, LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS LIEN, ADVANCED FROM SEP-24-2008 TO LAW AND MOTION AT SEP-17-2008 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER EX PARTE ORDER DATED 9/12/08.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER SHORTENING TIME FOR HEARING ON PETITION TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS LIEN, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER 973 MARKET ASSOCIATES, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTED PETITIONER 973 MARKET ASSOCIATES, LLC'S PETITION TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS LIEN AS NO OPPOSITION HAD BEEN FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
